notes: Official Kurasu Singapore coffee collection and product pages list current retail coffee items and prices. Kurasu's official Singapore store page confirms the Waterloo cafe serves the same lineup of coffee as Kyoto; in-store espresso drink prices were not published, so this batch uses official coffee retail menu items.

items.name: Kurasu Drip Coffee Bag - Ethiopia Sidamo Decaf
items.description: Medium-roast drip bag with peach, cherry, citrus and caramel notes.

items.name: Kurasu House Blend Dark
items.description: Medium-dark blend with orange peel, dark chocolate and buttery notes.

items.name: FAF Medium
items.description: Medium-roast coffee beans sold through Kurasu Singapore.

items.name: Kurasu Drip Coffee Bag - FAF Medium
items.description: Single-serve drip coffee bag using FAF medium-roast coffee.

items.name: Kurasu Drip Coffee Bag - FAF Dark
items.description: Single-serve drip coffee bag using FAF dark-roast coffee.

notes: Official Yahava Singapore koffee collection lists current product prices; official product pages supplied coffee descriptions. Prices use the collection page where it differed from older product-page snippets.

items.name: Blackgold
items.description: Single-origin bold coffee with dark cocoa and berry notes.

items.name: Espresso
items.description: Blend of Colombia, Ethiopia and Papua New Guinea coffees with cocoa and caramel notes.

items.name: Colombian
items.description: Bold single-origin Colombian coffee from the Bucaramanga region.

items.name: Kahava
items.description: Bold single-origin coffee with citrus, berries, nuts and dark chocolate notes.

items.name: Romeo No.5
items.description: Medium blend of Colombian, Ethiopian and Rwandan coffee beans.

items.name: Quattro
items.description: Bold Italian-style dark roast blend of Colombian, Ethiopian, Indian and Papua New Guinean beans.

items.name: Pacifica
items.description: Medium organic blend of Mexican and Peruvian arabicas with butter and chocolate milk notes.

items.name: Rush Brothers Coffee Capsules
items.description: Papua New Guinea coffee capsules compatible with original-line Nespresso machines.

notes: Official Enchanted Cafe menu page confirms the Rangoon Road outlet and halal cafe positioning, but its menu content is largely image-based. Representative item names, descriptions and prices were taken from the current Foodpanda delivery menu for Enchanted Cafe Rangoon Road.

items.name: Acai Bowl
items.description: Organic acai blended with banana and soy milk, topped with almond butter, berries and seeds.

items.name: Almond Butter Toast
items.description: Baked Ezekiel bread with homemade almond butter.

items.name: Avocado On Toast
items.description: Ezekiel bread with smashed avocado, pumpkin seeds, roasted almonds, salad and lemon.

items.name: Truffled Mushroom With Scrambled Eggs On Toast
items.description: Ezekiel bread with baked mushroom, scrambled eggs and mixed salad.

items.name: Smoked Salmon On Toast
items.description: Smoked salmon with mayonnaise and black sesame, served with mixed salad.

items.name: Beef Pie With Mashed Potato & Double Cheese
items.description: Minced beef and diced vegetables with mashed potato, cheddar and grana padano.

items.name: Truffle Mushroom Linguine
items.description: Linguine with mushrooms and truffle oil in cream sauce.

items.name: Chilli Crabmeat Linguine
items.description: Linguine with crabmeat and egg in homemade tomato sauce.

notes: Official Le Petit Paris menu page lists menu items, descriptions and SGD prices. Representative appetizers, mains, pasta and brunch items selected from the published menu.

items.description: Caramelized onions, beef stock, brioche bread and emmental cheese.

items.name: Country Pork Pate With Pistachio
items.description: Pork pate with cornichon pickles, cranberry jam and sourdough bread.

items.description: Escargot with butter, parsley, pork chorizo and croutons.

items.name: Ratatouille with Eggs
items.description: Vegetable ratatouille served with two fried eggs.

items.description: Duck confit with mash potato, breadcrumbs and garlic oil.
